articles.description: Moreangels Mbizah has blazed a trail in Zimbabwe as the first black African woman to found a conservation organisation in the country

articles.description: Theseus Shambare ZIMBABWE has begun the process of domesticating the CAADP Kampala Declaration, a new continental agriculture framework aimed at transforming Africa’s food systems beyond primary production into value addition,...

more.title: How the Skeleton of Mutapa Times is Based on Sarah Charlesworth's Work
more.description: Conceptual artist Sarah Charlesworth's 1979 study of how newspapers covered a solar eclipse inspired the framework behind The Mutapa Times.

more.title: Byo MP demands rescue plan for Zimbabweans in SA
more.description: Bulawayo North Constituency MP, Minenhle Gumede, has called on the Government to urgently coordinate efforts to facilitate the safe and dignified return of Zimbabweans from South Africa, amid renewed fears triggered by a fresh wave of xenophobic tensions.

more.title: BCC cracks down on illegal ECD centres, businesses
more.description: Source: BCC cracks down on illegal ECD centres, businesses — CITEZW Several Early Childhood Development (ECD) centres in Bulawayo are operating without approved building plans and medically examined food handlers, as health inspectors uncovered widespread non-compliance across the city. This emerged in the latest council minutes, which show that last month the Bulawayo City Council [...] The post BCC cracks down on illegal ECD centres, businesses appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Govt finalises arrears, debt clearance roadmap
more.description: Source: Govt finalises arrears, debt clearance roadmap – herald Debra Matabvu Senior Reporter ZIMBABWE has finalised a roadmap for its debt and arrears clearance programme and is targeting early next year to begin repaying outstanding obligations to international creditors. This is a major step towards restoring access to global financing and the plan follows high-level [...] The post Govt finalises arrears, debt clearance roadmap appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Zim walks talk on re-engagement
more.description: Source: Zim walks talk on re-engagement – herald Wallace Ruzvidzo Herald Reporter ZIMBABWE remains committed to strengthening ties and cooperation with all members of the international community, President Mnangagwa has said. He made the remarks yesterday after receiving letters of credence from Ambassadors-designate from Equatorial Guinea, New Zealand, Slovakia and Georgia. more.title: Zimbabwe shines at Passport DC, eyes growing US tourism market
more.description: Source: Zimbabwe shines at Passport DC, eyes growing US tourism market – herald Lloyd Makonya Correspondent ZIMBABWE made a bold and vibrant impression at the prestigious Passport DC Around the World Tour, positioning itself as a premier African destination, while tapping into one of its fastest-growing tourism markets, the United States of America. Held on [...] The post Zimbabwe shines at Passport DC, eyes growing US tourism market appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Harare’s Sally Mugabe Hospital records the highest births in Zimbabwe with 22 000 baby deliveries
more.description: Source: Harare’s Sally Mugabe Hospital records the highest births in Zimbabwe with 22 000 baby deliveries – herald Trust Freddy Zimpapers Correspondent SALLY MUGABE Hospital in Harare continues to dominate the country’s maternal health sector, recording more than 22 000 deliveries last year, the highest number of births at any single institution in Zimbabwe. Speaking [...] The post Harare’s Sally Mugabe Hospital records the highest births in Zimbabwe with 22 000 baby deliveries appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: NRZ unveils three-phase turnaround strategy
more.description: Source: NRZ unveils three-phase turnaround strategy – herald Farirai Machivenyika Senior Reporter THE National Railways of Zimbabwe has adopted a three-phase turnaround strategy running from this year to 2030, under which it expects to move 12 million tonnes in freight and generate annual revenue of US$131,8 million by the end of that period. This was [...] The post NRZ unveils three-phase turnaround strategy appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Harare Drive–Airport Road interchange works start
more.description: Source: Harare Drive–Airport Road interchange works start – herald Freeman Razemba Senior Reporter THE construction of a new interchange has started at the intersection of Harare Drive and Joshua Mqabuko Nkomo Road (Airport Road) as Government continues to demonstrate its commitment to providing modern, efficient and safe transport infrastructure. Contractors have begun clearing land to [...] The post Harare Drive–Airport Road interchange works start appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Govt declares Mutoko accident State of Disaster
more.description: Source: Govt declares Mutoko accident State of Disaster – herald Ivan Zhakata Herald Correspondent GOVERNMENT has declared a State of Disaster following the horrific road accident at Suswe along the Harare-Nyamapanda Highway, which claimed 17 lives and injured 33 others, six of them critically. The accident occurred on Monday at the 175km peg in Mudzi [...] The post Govt declares Mutoko accident State of Disaster appeared first on Zimbabwe Situation .

more.title: Ramaphosa haunted by private visit to Mnangagwa’s farm, issues yet another explanation distancing himself from Chivayo
more.description: LAST weekend’s private visit to President Emmerson Mnangagwa’s farm in Kwekwe is posing a headache to South African President Cyril Ramaphosa, who is now facing intense scrutiny in his own backyard. During the his tour, Ramaphosa hobnobbed with controversial Zimbabwean tenderpreneur Wicknell Chivayo, whose murky business transactions have been flagged by SA’s financial intelligence agency. [...] The post Ramaphosa haunted by private visit to Mnangagwa’s farm, issues yet another explanation distancing himself from Chivayo appeared first on NewZimbabwe.com .
